title: Navin Kumar — Engineering Leader
description: Application Engineering Leader · Ruby on Rails · AWS · Microservices · CI/CD. 9+ years building scalable SaaS platforms.
user_comment: This is a JSON Feed for Navin Kumar's portfolio. Subscribe to stay updated on new roles, skills, and projects.

items.title: Portfolio Updated — March 2026
items.content_html:
Navin Kumar's portfolio has been updated with his latest experience at CloudBolt Software as Lead Software Engineer, updated skill highlights, and a refreshed editorial design.

  • 9+ years experience architecting scalable SaaS platforms
  • Expert in Ruby on Rails, AWS, Azure, Microservices & CI/CD
  • Open to Senior / Lead Engineering roles globally
items.summary: Portfolio refresh for 2026 — new design, updated experience at CloudBolt Software, and open to senior engineering roles.

items.title: Lead Software Engineer — CloudBolt Software
items.content_html: Leading a team of 5+ engineers delivering enterprise SaaS solutions for 10K+ users. Drove monolith-to-microservices migration, improved deployment from bi-weekly to weekly, reduced response times by ~30%, and maintained 99.9%+ system uptime.
items.summary: Current role: Lead Software Engineer at CloudBolt Software (Jun 2022 – Present).

items.title: Senior Software Engineer — CloudBolt Software
items.content_html: Designed scalable REST APIs and backend services handling high-volume enterprise workloads. Automated infrastructure provisioning with AWS CloudFormation. Mentored junior engineers, reducing onboarding time by ~30%.
items.summary: Senior Software Engineer at CloudBolt Software (Oct 2020 – Jun 2022).
